title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API and Docker support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama—chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, push, and delete models with a few lines of code.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama—use local models as LLMs, chat, or embed providers inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-ui)
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama—chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoint proxy.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama—synchronous and asynchronous APIs, streaming, embeddings, and custom options.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for Ollama—strongly-typed async client for chat, generate, pull, list, delete, and embeddings.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app that streams answers from a local Ollama instance via the ollama-js SDK.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration—use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot proxy that replaces OpenAI with your local Ollama models inside VS Code.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama responses into any channel using slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama—mention the bot in channels or DMs and get streamed answers.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and compose examples for running Ollama in Docker and Docker Compose.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat client for Ollama written in Go—supports conversation history, markdown, and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama—install and pin exact versions declaratively on NixOS or via nix-shell.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama HTTP API—chat, generate, embed, and manage models with Finch/Tesla.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama—supports .NET 6+ and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of 150+ pre-converted models (Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.) ready to pull.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: Complete RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Llama 3 generator and LangChain, including PDF ingestion.
